nodes.name: settings
nodes.responsibility: Application settings, configuration persistence, and user preferences management

nodes.name: zterm_util
nodes.responsibility: Common utility functions and helpers shared across crates

nodes.name: sum_tree
nodes.responsibility: Efficient range-tree data structure with aggregate values for fast queries

nodes.name: string-offset
nodes.responsibility: Byte offset tracking in strings, UTF-8 aware position management

nodes.name: field_mask
nodes.responsibility: Selective field updates for protobuf/structured data

nodes.name: settings_value
nodes.responsibility: Type-safe settings value representation with derive macro support

nodes.name: settings_value_derive
nodes.responsibility: Procedural macro for deriving SettingsValue trait

nodes.name: persistence
nodes.responsibility: Data persistence layer for serialization and storage

nodes.name: simple_logger
nodes.responsibility: Logging infrastructure with configurable levels and outputs

hyperedges.name: Settings and Configuration
hyperedges.responsibility: Unified settings management with type-safe values and persistence

hyperedges.name: Data Structures
hyperedges.responsibility: Reusable, efficient data structures for common patterns

design_patterns.rationale: settings_value_derive eliminates boilerplate for SettingsValue implementation
sum_tree enables efficient range queries and aggregation operations
field_mask enables partial updates without full structure replacement
string_offset handles byte vs. character positions in UTF-8 text

architectural_rationale.settings_hierarchy: Separating settings_value (types) from settings_crate (management) enables reuse
architectural_rationale.sum_tree_purpose: Efficient aggregation queries on large data structures (e.g., line counts)
architectural_rationale.string_offset_handling: Terminal text manipulation requires byte-accurate offsets across UTF-8 boundaries
architectural_rationale.field_mask_utility: Protobuf-style partial updates reduce unnecessary data transfers and updates
